Choose the artifact that matches your platform:

| Platform | Artifact |
| --- | --- |
| Linux x86_64 musl | `jwt-cracker-rust-{{ version_without_v }}-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz` |
| Windows x86_64 GNU | `jwt-cracker-rust-{{ version_without_v }}-x86_64-pc-windows-gnu.zip` |

```text
jwt-cracker-rust --help
```

## Notes

- Release artifacts include the executable, `README.md`, and `LICENSE`.
- This release is intended for authorized testing only.
- Report bugs or regressions through GitHub Issues.
